IT WAS ALSO SUGGESTED BY THE COURT THAT THE TRIAL DATE BE CONTINUED FOR 90 DAYS AS WELL AS THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL WILL NOTIFY THE OPPOSING PARTY OF THE CONTINUANCES. MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE: DREXEL A. BRADSHAW, ESQ.'S MOVING TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL
JOHN CHOI, PLAINTIFF

THIS WAS AN IN CAMERA HEARING AT THE REQUEST OF MOVING PARTY, DREXEL A. BRADSHAW, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL'S MOTION To Be Relieved As Counsel FOR PLAINTIFF, JOHN CHOI.

AFTER TESTIMONY AND ARGUMENT THE COURT ADOPTED THE FOLLOWING RULING, DREXEL A. BRADSHAW, ESQ.WILL BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL NO LATER THAN 60 DAYS TO GIVE PLAINTIFF, JOHN CHOI, AN OPPORTUNITY TO FIND NEW COUNSEL. IT WAS ALSO SUGGESTED BY THE COURT THAT THE TRIAL DATE BE CONTINUED FOR 90 DAYS AS WELL AS THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL WILL NOTIFY THE OPPOSING PARTY OF THE CONTINUANCES. DREXEL A. BRADSHAW, ESQ. WILL PREPARE THE ORDER.
